title: mnemion cornutum
intro: Mnemion cornutum, also known as the horned coral tree, is a type of plant native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. The herbal preparations of Mnemion cornutum can be made into a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments.
